scope: one RunPod OpenAI-compatible endpoint attempt for AMOF heavy lane; no UI work, no master integration, no deploy/release work, no broad provider architecture

endpoint_capable_runtime_decision.reason_existing_template_not_enough: Existing template amof-mvp-pytorch-cuda121 exposes Jupyter/SSH and is reusable substrate, but it is not an OpenAI-compatible inference endpoint.
endpoint_capable_runtime_decision.gpu_type: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

startup_observation.models_probe: timed out with no bytes after 20 seconds
startup_observation.worker_runtime: worker did not reach usable OpenAI-compatible /models response

planning_proof.reason: Skipped by kill criteria: endpoint was not healthy/OpenAI-compatible.

patch_proof.reason: Skipped because planning proof did not pass.

cost_guardrail_verdict.approx_cost: bounded to a short failed worker startup; exact billing should be checked in RunPod console

blocker: RunPod Serverless vLLM worker for MiniMax M2.5 on the selected 4x RTX PRO 6000 endpoint exited before /models became healthy. Need worker logs or a known-good vLLM template/runtime for MiniMax before retrying.
